message:
style(node): apply rustfmt across 5 modules

Format-only changes in audience_token.rs (chain append), lockstep
harness (let-chain line breaks), nversion_oracle (receipt check),
artifact_signing (assert closure), and proof_scheduler (budget
condition line break).  No logic changes.
